questions.text: Describe a product you launched from 0 to 1. What was your role and what was the outcome?
How do you decide what to build next when you have 10 competing feature requests?
Tell me about a time a product decision you made turned out to be wrong. How did you handle it?
How would you define and measure success for a new onboarding flow?
Describe how you work with engineering when there's a disagreement about scope or timeline.
